goals: Initialize the access control configuration for their AI assistant
Set up their own ID as the owner with full access
Test the stranger deflection flow by simulating an unknown contact message
Approve a pending contact request to complete the approval workflow

user_agent_config.personality: Intellectually curious and detail-oriented, values security and privacy while being open to learning new technologies that support her work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the concept of access control and privacy protection but does not know specific tool names or internal APIs. She is familiar with messaging platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

end_condition: The user has successfully initialized the access control system, configured themselves as owner, tested the stranger deflection flow, and completed a contact approval cycle.
